recommendations.title: White Snake
recommendations.overview: One day a young woman named Blanca is saved by Xuan, a snake catcher from a nearby village. As they set off an a journey to discover her real identity, the pair develop feelings for each other.

recommendations.title: Cat Soup
recommendations.overview: The surreal black comedy follows Nyatta, an anthropomorphic kitten, on his travel to the land of the dead and back in an effort to save his sister's soul.

recommendations.title: Russian Ark
recommendations.overview: A ghost and a French marquis wander through the Winter Palace in St Petersburg, encountering scenes from many different periods of its history.

recommendations.title: Boys in the Trees
recommendations.overview: On Halloween 1997, two estranged teen skaters embark on a surreal journey through their memories, dreams and fears.

recommendations.title: Under the Silver Lake

recommendations.title: Alligator 2: The Mutation
recommendations.overview: A giant mutated alligator runs riot in a small town after the sewer system washes it into a lake.

recommendations.title: Closely Watched Trains

recommendations.title: Horus: Prince of the Sun
recommendations.overview: Young Horus lives in a mythical Scandinavia of the Iron Age. Recovering the stolen Sword of the Sun from a rock giant, he learns he must travel to the lands of his ancestors, encountering the beautiful but enigmatic Hilda as his journey leads to a se

recommendations.title: Colors of Evil: Red
recommendations.overview: When a girl's body is found on a beach in Poland's Tricity, a prosecutor teams up with the victim's mother on an impassioned quest for the truth.

recommendations.title: Swiss Army Man
